name: Toronto Basement Underpinning

trustIndicators.guarantee: Zero Risk, No Questions Asked Warranty

knowsAbout: City of Toronto Basement Flooding Protection Subsidy

uniqueValueProposition.oneLiner: Toronto's highest-volume basement underpinning specialist. 20 dedicated crews handle drawings, permits, lowering, waterproofing, and finishing under one roof, with a zero-risk no-questions warranty.
keyDifferentiators: 20 active crews, fastest scheduling in Toronto for a structural project
Turnkey scope: architectural drawings, city permits, underpinning, waterproofing, and finishing, all in-house
Zero risk, no-questions-asked warranty across every project
proofPoints: 20+ years specializing in Toronto basement underpinning
Hundreds of completed Toronto underpinning projects
Fully licensed and insured general contractors

testimonials.quote: We finally finished our 1920s Annex basement after underpinning lowered the slab to a real 8-foot ceiling. The crew warned us about every dust event in advance, swept the site daily, and finished a week ahead of the engineered schedule.
testimonials.name: Megan R.

testimonials.quote: Bought a North York bungalow specifically to legalize a basement apartment. TBU handled drawings, the City of Toronto permit, structural engineering, and the finishing. Tenant moved in two months after the pour cured. Zero callbacks since.
testimonials.name: Daniel T.

testimonials.quote: We had three contractors quote our Leslieville semi. TBU was the only one who explained the shared-wall sequencing and walked our neighbour through the process before booking. Underpinning, waterproofing, and a sump pump done in five weeks.
testimonials.name: Priya S.

testimonials.quote: Forest Hill home, full underpinning plus high-end finishing. The drawings were thorough, the engineer's site visits were on schedule, and the crew respected the original mouldings on the upper floors. Pricing was exactly what was quoted  -  no surprise change orders.
testimonials.name: Charles W.

testimonials.quote: We had a chronic leak that the previous waterproofer never solved. TBU diagnosed hydrostatic pressure under the slab, installed new weeping tile and a battery-backup sump. Bone dry through this year's spring melt. Worth every dollar.
testimonials.name: Olu A.
